name: render_page
description: Renders a web page using a headless browser and returns the final DOM/HTML after JavaScript execution. Use this skill for JavaScript-heavy SPAs, dynamic content, or pages that require client-side rendering. Returns the rendered HTML.

url.description: The URL of the page to render. Must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.

wait_selector.description: Optional CSS selector to wait for before capturing. Use for pages that load content dynamically.

wait_time.description: Optional time in milliseconds to wait after page load. Default is 0.

viewport_width.description: Viewport width in pixels. Default is 1920.

viewport_height.description: Viewport height in pixels. Default is 1080.
